zh.Stanton, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德斯坦頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Merlay於大約1255年出生在英國諾圖波藍德莫普斯時，她的父親Roger III Merlay47歲，母親Isabel de Ros31歲。她於1275年5月7日之前與Sir Robert Somerville在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1303年7月3日在英國諾圖波藍德斯坦頓享年49歲。

zh-hans.Morpeth, Northumberland, England: 英国諾圖波藍德莫普斯
zh-hans.Stanton, Northumberland, England: 英国諾圖波藍德斯坦頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Merlay于大约1255年出生在英国諾圖波藍德莫普斯时，她的父亲Roger III Merlay47岁，母亲Isabel de Ros31岁。她于1275年5月7日之前与Sir Robert Somerville在英国斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1303年7月3日在英国諾圖波藍德斯坦頓享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Merlay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician (Merlán): habitational name from any of the seven places called Merlán in Galicia (Spain), from the ancient Germanic personal name Merila.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Merlay was born about 1255, in Morpeth, Northumberland, England, her father, Roger III Merlay, was 47 and her mother, Isabel de Ros, was 31. She married Sir Robert Somerville before 7 May 1275, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 3 July 1303, in Stanton, Northumberland, England, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Merlay est née environ 1255, à Morpeth, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Roger III Merlay, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Ros, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Somerville avant 7 mai 1275, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 juillet 1303, à Stanton, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Merlay um 1255 in Morpeth, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger III Merlay 47 und ihre Mutter Isabel de Ros 31. Sie hat vor 7. Mai 1275 in Staffordshire, England Sir Robert Somerville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Juli 1303 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Stanton, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Merlay è nata il circa 1255 nel Morpeth, Northumberland, England, sua padre, Roger III Merlay, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Isabel de Ros, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Somerville prima del 7 maggio 1275, nel Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 luglio 1303, nel Stanton, Northumberland, England, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Merlayが約1255年にイギリスノースウンバーランドモーペスで生まれた時，父Roger III Merlayは47歳，母Isabel de Rosは31歳であった。1275年5月7日以前にイギリススタフォードシュアイアでSir Robert Somervilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1303年7月3日にイギリスノースウンバーランドスタントンで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Merlay(이)가 대략 1255년 영국 노르스벌랜드 모르페스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger III Merlay(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Ros(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1275년 5월 7일 이전 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 Sir Robert Somerville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1303년 7월 3일 영국 노르스벌랜드 스탠턴에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Merlay nasceu aproximadamente 1255, em Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger III Merlay, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Ros, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Somerville antes 7 de maio de 1275, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de julho de 1303, em Stanton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Merlay родилась около 1255 г. в местности морпет, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger III Merlay было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Ros, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Somerville перед 7 май 1275 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 3 июля 1303 г. в местности стантон, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Merlay nació aproximadamente 1255, en Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger III Merlay, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Isabel de Ros, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Somerville antes de 7 de mayo de 1275, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de julio de 1303, en Stanton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años.
